recommendations.title: Atlantis: Milo's Return
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action
recommendations.overview: Milo and Kida reunite with their friends to investigate strange occurances around the world that seem to have links to the secrets of Atlantis.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Tad Stones, Toby Shelton

recommendations.title: Tarzan & Jane
recommendations.overview: With the first anniversary of her wedding to Tarzan beckoning, Jane ponders how to make it the perfect English celebration.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Don MacKinnon, Steve Loter, Lisa Schaffer

recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Horror, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction, TV Movie

recommendations.title: Dante's Inferno: An Animated Epic
recommendations.overview: Dante journeys through the nine circles of Hell -- limbo, lust, gluttony, greed, anger, heresy, violence, fraud and treachery -- in search of his true love, Beatrice. An animated version of the video game of the same name.
recommendations.director: Sangjin Kim, Jong-Sik Nam, Victor Cook, Yasuomi Umetsu, Shukou Murase, Lee Seung-Gyu, Mike Disa

recommendations.title: Ben 10 vs. the Universe: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A blast from Ben's past returns to do double the damage on Team Tennyson and planet Earth itself, forcing Ben to go interstellar to save the day. Based on the 2016 reboot.

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Secret of the Omnitrix
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Family, TV Movie, Action

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Haunted Holidays

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.

recommendations.title: Ben Gen 10
recommendations.overview: When Ben meets a young Generator Rex on the run from a hostile Providence, he must work through a series of misunderstandings, and defeat the dark wizard Hex in order to save the world.
